segments.text: So Zarina ma'am, doctor is online, you can speak with the doctor.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Am I speaking to Zarina Lukman Dalal?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Doctor Tasnim speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. This call was regarding your medical interview. So is it the right time to speak to you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Shall I continue in English or Hindi?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Which language shall I continue, English or Hindi?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, so please note that this call is being recorded for the company's quality and audit purposes. We have received your insurance proposal and a telephonic medical verification will be required for its processing, in which we will ask medical and verification details. Whatever questions are asked will be based on your insurance application form and this recorded call will take around 10 to 12 minutes. So, may I continue with the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, whatever information you provide, regarding your health and habits, based on that, a proposal form will be made. That will become part of your insurance application form, and if your proposal is accepted, then a legal contract for insurance will be formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance. Any incorrect answer or incorrect information can affect your policy, or your policy can be terminated or rejected. And claims can be rejected, either before or after the policy is issued. So, give all answers correctly and completely, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Your details are in front of me, so your full name is Zarina Lukman Dalal.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Do you do a job or business?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: What did you give in ID proof, Aadhaar, PAN card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Give the last four numbers of the Aadhaar card.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And where are you located now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Tell me the name of the city, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, now I will ask some health-related questions. All questions are important, please answer with yes or no. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Excuse me for asking these questions, but it's important. Have you consumed or do you consume cigarettes, beedi, paan, gutka, tobacco, or nicotine in the last two years?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you consumed or do you consume alcohol?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has any doctor told you to stop or reduce alcohol? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any recreational drugs that a physician has not prescribed and you are taking, is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever been told you have low or high blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides, or any treatment related to that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, chest heaviness, chest discomfort, heart murmurs, heart attack, heart valve disorder, coronary artery disease, congenital heart disease, rheumatic fever, palpitations, difficulty breathing, or any heart-related problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer or any precancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesion, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyp, cyst, nodule, lump, or any growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes or high sugar in blood or urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, or any thyroid or endocrine disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, frequent cough or prolonged cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease, or any respiratory complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any liver problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, AIDS, HIV, blood, or any autoimmune disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, fits, paralysis, stroke, transient ischemic attack, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, dementia, Alzheimer's, or any neurological, nervous, or mental health problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux, irritable bowel syndrome, frequent indigestion, stomach ulcer, atrophic gastritis, Barrett's esophagus, ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease, or any problem of pancreas, stomach, or intestine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney or gallbladder stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hernia, or any kidney, genital, or urinary system problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Frequent backache, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular deformities, any physical disability, or any muscle, bone, joint, ligament, or spine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Vision loss, cataract, glaucoma, low vision, double vision, or any eye problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hearing loss, low hearing, difficulty swallowing, hoarseness in voice, difficulty speaking, ear discharge, or any ear, nose, throat problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any other health-related information you want to give that we haven't asked and you want to tell?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no ma'am, nothing like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you had any test where a problem was found, like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, PET scan, MRI scan, endoscopy, colonoscopy, biopsy, treadmill test, mammogram, or pap smear?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has any treatment been going on for more than two weeks for any problem, or have you been told to take a specialist doctor's opinion, or have you been advised any test like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, MRI scan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any birth defect or hereditary problem like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you unable to perform any daily activities or have you taken leave from work for more than two weeks? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you or your husband been advised any test, treatment, or counseling for HIV, AIDS, or other venereal diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing like that has been said.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And besides the information you've given, has your weight suddenly decreased or increased, or have you consulted a doctor for any problem, or been advised any surgery? Is there anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. And are you pregnant now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any pregnancy complications like high BP, high sugar, or any pregnancy-related complication?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever consulted a doctor for female problems, like a lump in the breast or any breast problem, or abnormal pap smear, or period pain, or irregular periods, or any problem related to periods, vagina, uterus, ovaries, or fallopian tubes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So you declare that all the information you have given is correct and complete, and your given information will be used for policy records, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So I give my best wishes. Thank you for the processing of Tata AIA Life Insurance's tele-medical.
segments.speaker: doctor
